hooks.command: cwd=$(pwd); if echo "$cwd" | grep -q "$HOME/Projects/"; then proj=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|$HOME/Projects/||" | cut -d/ -f1 | sed 's/\.git$//'); vault="$HOME/Notes/Work/Projects/$proj"; if [ ! -d "$vault" ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"New project detected: $proj. No matching vault entry at ~/Notes/Work/Projects/$proj/. Consider asking the user if they want to register this in the vault.\"}"; fi; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf\s+/|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE))'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Blocked: destructive command detected. Review and run manually if intended."}'; exit 2; fi
echo '{"feedback": "Session ending. Remember: update ~/Notes/Claude/_WorkContext.md and append to ~/Notes/Claude/SessionLogs/ if substantive work occurred."}'
